prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve been circling this all morning—now it’s your turn to take the wheel. You don’t have to finish it, just give it five focused minutes. You’ve handled tougher things before, and this is well within your reach. Start with one tiny action: open the doc, write one sentence, make one call. Momentum will show up once you do. Future you is already grateful. Deep breath—3, 2, 1… go.
